findings.evidence: `rg -n "isSouthWest_iff|isSouthWest_swap" code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/JFunction.lean` shows `isSouthWest_iff` is `@[simp, grind =]` while `isSouthWest_swap` at line 415 has no attribute.
findings.fix: Add the same automation style as the coordinate characterization, e.g. `@[simp, grind =]` on `isSouthWest_swap` if it does not create a loop.
findings.issue: `GridPoint.isSouthWest_swap` is the public characteristic lemma for how diagonal reflection acts on `IsSouthWest`, but it is unannotated, so `simp`/`grind` cannot normalize reflected southwest goals through the new API.

summary: The transpose API now includes the diagram-level `JO`/`JX` invariance lemmas, but the core reflected southwest relation is missing the automation annotation expected for a characteristic normal-form lemma.
